transcript: I need someone to run tonight, yeah? Miss, I almost had to get the server. There's no immediate date. No, you don't understand. I need someone here now. Fortunately, we don't provide that service. At least we can do it here on Tuesday afternoon. Tuesday? No, because they're eating everything. I'd say it's like living in the bloody Dark Ages. Have you tried using the traps? Tried one or two. Maybe you're not deploying them correctly. No, because the traps aren't working. Look, I'm going to need a bigger trap. My TV! I've got you. Hold on.  We'll be right back. Yeah, I'm definitely going to need a bigger truck. We'll be right back. © transcript Emily Beynon
